title: 12 PCS Heavy Duty self Adhesive Clear Hooks Clear Waterproof 15kg 33lb Plastic Strong Sticky Hook for Bathroom Kitchen Wall Door Metal, Tiles, Wood, Ceramic to Make Garland
features: 12 pieces adhesive hanging hooks Hooks come in a protected cardboard box. The sticky hooks for hanging are very strong, the load-bearing is max 15k/33lb
Heavy duty, high quality. Perfect hanging hooks for kitchen and bathroom any glass, wood, ceramic, tiles, metal,
Please use the adhesive hooks after 24 hours of installation. NO DRILL NEEDED, Just clean and dry the surface, then Peel off the back protection and stick it on the smooth surface.

The wall hooks heavy-duty can be 180 Degrees rotating helping you save space. It can use ceiling hooks, coat hooks, key hooks, plant hooks, bath towel hooks, picture hooks, and towel hooks. Ideal for Christmas Lights Balloon Garland
PLEASE DON'T STICK HOOKS TO WALLPAPER, PLASTERBOARD, BRICKS, or POOR WALL SURFACE
Hooks come in a nice large letter box that will fit the door's mail hole. Size of hooks 6cm x 6cm deep 2cm
How to remove hooks? Heat it with a hair dryer and slowly remove it from the side without leaving a trace.
description: Product Description Please use the adhesive hooks after 24 hours of installation. NO DRILL NEEDED. Just clean and dry the surface, then Peel off the back protection and stick it on the smooth surface. PLEASE DON'T STICK HOOKS TO WALLPAPER, PLASTERBOARD, BRICKS, or POOR WALL SURFACE Hooks come in a nice large letter box that will fit the door's mail hole. Size of hooks 6cm x 6cm deep 2cm+0 Before installing the adhesive hook, please make sure the surface is clean, dry, and free from dust and oil, and wipe it dry first. Remove the transparent film on the back of the hook.Paste on any smooth surface and press it tightly to remove any bubbles. It is recommended to leave 24 hours before hanging any item to ensure the product is firm and fixed.
